walkers.name: Happy Tails Pet Care
walkers.priceNote: In business since 2006. Pricing available upon registration.
walkers.highlight: Neighborhood Fave award winner every year since 2020. Licensed, bonded, insured. Red Cross pet first aid & CPR certified.

walkers.name: Fetch! Pet Care of East Bay & Contra Costa
walkers.priceNote: All caregivers are bonded, insured, and background checked.
walkers.highlight: National franchise with local ownership. Professional, bonded, insured caregivers. Excellent last-minute availability.

walkers.name: Dog Tired Adventures
walkers.priceNote: Group neighborhood walk 30min: $35, 60min: $50. Private walk 30min: $40, 60min: $60. Group hike 60min: $60.
walkers.highlight: Won 'Best Dog Walker' from Diablo Magazine & 'Best Dog Walker - East Bay' from Bay Woof. Professional dog walking & hiking company since 2015.

walkers.name: Jessica (Individual Walker)
walkers.highlight: "Jessica is a terrific dogwalker! She was on time every day and our 2 dogs just jumped in her car." Highly rated with repeat clients.

walkers.name: Stephanie L. (Individual Walker)
walkers.priceNote: 30 years of experience. 22 repeat clients. Based in Danville.
walkers.highlight: "Stephanie has been walking our cutie, senior boy for a little while now and we couldn't be happier with her!" Most experienced walker in the area.

walkers.name: PupWalks
walkers.priceNote: Private customized 15/30/45/60 minute walks. No group walks ever. Donates profits to rescues.
walkers.highlight: Most affordable option. Private walks only (never groups). Walk verification with GPS tracking & photos. Donates profits to dog rescues.

walkers.name: Crow Canyon Pet Sitting
walkers.priceNote: Lowest rates in San Ramon area. Large, difficult and high-energy breeds welcomed.
walkers.highlight: Lowest price in the area. 5-star rated on Bark. Serves San Ramon, Danville, Dublin. Nearly a decade in business.

walkers.name: House Calls Pet Sitting
walkers.priceNote: Established pet sitting and dog walking service.
walkers.highlight: "Debbie was great in setting up Cyndi to walk and play with my dog during the day while I am at work."

walkers.name: Elisa's Precious Paws
walkers.priceNote: Exclusive dog walking service. Walks are private and personal.
walkers.highlight: Exclusive dog walking service focusing on San Ramon Valley. Private, personal walks since 2015.
walkers.filterNotes: Rating ✅ | Reviews: limited data | Price: unknown

walkers.name: Bay Paw & Hoof Runner
walkers.priceNote: Dog walking, pet sitting, and pet training.
walkers.highlight: Offers dog walking, private training, and pet sitting. Open 4AM-12AM.
walkers.filterNotes: Rating ✅ | Reviews: limited data | Price: unknown
